landing.layout: Flex container with centered content, wrapped in SafeAreaView.
landing.visuals: Implement an ASCII-wave background using Expo Canvas or Skia, falling back to a looping dark green pattern video/gif if heavy. Large logo with lock icon.
landing.typography: Headline 'Encrypted. Private. Yours.' prominent in center.
landing.cta: Primary 'Get Started' and Secondary 'Log In' buttons at bottom.

auth.visuals: Header containing a subtle #4ADE80 Lock icon.
auth.forms: Email, Password inputs. Use secureTextEntry for password.

dashboard.navigation: Bottom Tab Navigator (Chats, Friends) with background #111111, borderTop #2D4A3E, active tint #4ADE80.
dashboard.header: Left: 'Silent Signal' branding. Right: Search & Profile icon buttons.

chats_tab.item_layout: Row with Avatar (left), Name & Preview (middle), Timestamp & Unread Indicator (right).
chats_tab.preview_text: If encrypted, show a placeholder like '[Encrypted Message]' in muted text with a tiny lock icon.

friends_tab.layout: Top section for 'Pending Requests', bottom section for 'Friends List'.
friends_tab.item_layout: Row with Avatar, Name, and Accept/Decline icon buttons.

chat_room.layout: SafeAreaView. Header, scrollable message list, anchored input bar.
chat_room.header: Title: Contact Name. Subtitle: Monospace 'E2E ENCRYPTED' (#4ADE80) with lock icon. Right action: Vanishing Message toggle.
chat_room.message_list: Inverted flatlist or flex-end layout. Display monospace timestamps under messages.
chat_room.input_bar: Container (#1A1A1A) with borderTop (#2D4A3E). TextInput rounded, Send button (#4ADE80).
chat_room.group_features: If group chat, include a 'Copy Invite Code' button in header or settings sheet.

animations.messages: Fade and slight scale-in when sending/receiving messages.

testing.requirements: ALL interactive elements (Touchable, Button, TextInput) MUST include a 'testID' attribute (which maps to data-testid in web/React Native testing) reflecting its role, e.g., testID='login-submit-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build strictly as an Expo React Native application targeting iOS/Android/Web.
Do NOT deviate from the precise color palette defined above.
For typography, rely on React Native's default system sans-serif for body/headings, but EXPLICITLY use 'monospace' font family for all timestamps, keys, and encryption tags.
Use StyleSheet.create for all component styling, utilizing the provided exact HEX codes.
Implement navigation using Expo Router or React Navigation.
Ensure all user inputs have appropriate keyboard types (email-address, etc.) and autoCapitalize settings.
Ensure the lock icon and #4ADE80 green are consistently used as visual cues for privacy/security actions.
For the landing screen ASCII background, consider lightweight alternatives like react-native-svg or a simple animated gradient if Skia is too heavy.
Ensure all Touchables have hitSlop configured for better mobile accessibility.
